sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108353" key="u(podrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδρομ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n108353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑποτρέχω</ref></xr>, c. acc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>, in <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">pf.</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὐπαδεδρόμακεν.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
